src/core/task/Task.ts.purpose: This module implements the core task execution engine that manages AI assistant conversations, handles API interactions with multiple providers, tracks token and tool usage, and coordinates message flow including streaming responses and user interactions.

src/core/webview/ClineProvider.ts.purpose: This module provides core task management and webview integration functionality for the RooCode extension, handling task lifecycle events, provider communication, and UI state synchronization. It serves as the central hub for coordinating AI-assisted coding tasks within the VS Code environment.

src/shared/api.ts.purpose: This module provides shared TypeScript utilities and type definitions for configuring and routing API requests to AI models, including provider-specific settings, reasoning capabilities, and token management.

src/core/webview/webviewMessageHandler.t.purpose: This module handles bidirectional communication between the webview UI and the backend, processing user interactions, state management, and integration with various services like terminal, git, file system, and cloud features. It serves as the central message routing and processing hub for the application's core functionality.

src/services/mcp/McpHub.ts.purpose: Manages Model Context Protocol (MCP) server connections and configurations within VS Code, handling lifecycle operations like connecting, disconnecting, and monitoring MCP servers through various transport mechanisms.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/ChatView..purpose: This is the main chat interface component for a VS Code extension that enables AI-assisted coding conversations, handling message display, user input, file operations, and integration with various AI providers.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/ChatRow.t.purpose: This component renders individual chat messages in a web-based chat interface, handling various message types including user input, AI responses, tool executions, and system notifications. It manages the visual presentation and interaction logic for chat conversations within a VS Code extension environment.

webview-ui/src/components/modes/ModesVie.purpose: This file implements the UI component for managing AI assistant modes in a VS Code extension, allowing users to configure, create, edit, and delete custom modes with specific prompt configurations.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/CodeIndex.purpose: This component provides a UI popover for managing codebase indexing settings, allowing users to configure embedding providers, URLs, models, and related parameters for code search functionality.

src/api/providers/bedrock.ts.purpose: This file implements the AWS Bedrock provider integration for handling AI model completions and streaming responses. It provides error handling, model parameter configuration, and telemetry integration for Bedrock-based AI services.

src/api/providers/openai-native.ts.purpose: This file implements a native OpenAI API provider handler that manages AI model interactions, streaming responses, cost calculation, and telemetry for the Roo platform. It serves as the primary integration layer between the application and OpenAI's API services.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/ChatTextA.purpose: This component provides a rich text input interface for chat conversations, handling user message composition, attachment management, mode selection, and API configuration within a VS Code webview environment.

src/api/providers/openai-codex.ts.purpose: This module implements an API handler for OpenAI's Codex service, enabling AI-powered code completion and generation through OAuth-authenticated requests to the Codex backend. It manages session state, processes streaming responses, and handles tool calls within the Roo Code platform.

apps/web-evals/src/app/runs/new/new-run..purpose: This file implements a React client-side form for creating and configuring new evaluation runs, allowing users to select models, configure settings, and launch executions through either VSCode or CLI methods.

src/core/assistant-message/NativeToolCal.purpose: This module parses native tool call formats from AI assistants into a standardized internal representation for execution. It handles both regular tool calls and dynamic MCP (Model Coordination Protocol) tools with special naming conventions.

apps/web-evals/src/app/runs/[id]/run.tsx.purpose: This file implements a detailed run monitoring interface for evaluating AI agent performance, displaying task execution logs, metrics, and statuses in a web UI. It provides functionality to view, filter, and interact with individual task runs including stopping executions and copying logs.

src/core/assistant-message/presentAssist.purpose: This module processes and presents assistant messages to users, handling both text content and tool execution requests. It manages the conversation flow by sequentially processing message blocks, coordinating user approvals for tool usage, and maintaining checkpoints during streaming interactions.

src/core/config/CustomModesManager.ts.purpose: Manages custom mode configurations for the Roo extension, handling persistence, caching, import/export operations, and file watching for .roomodes files in both global and project-level contexts.

webview-ui/src/components/settings/ApiOp.purpose: This component provides a user interface for configuring API settings and model selections for various AI providers within a webview-based application. It manages provider-specific configurations, model validation, and dynamic UI rendering based on selected providers and models.

src/core/config/ProviderSettingsManager..purpose: Manages provider configuration settings and profiles for the application, handling synchronization between local and cloud-based provider configurations including migration logic and profile management.

src/core/tools/ReadFileTool.ts.purpose: Provides intelligent file reading capabilities with support for different reading modes (slice and indentation-based), binary file handling including images, and integration with task context tracking. The tool enables AI agents to efficiently access and process file contents while maintaining security boundaries and providing structured feedback.

packages/cloud/src/WebAuthService.ts.purpose: This module implements web-based authentication services for a cloud platform, handling user login, session management, and organization membership verification through integration with Clerk authentication services.

src/i18n/index.ts.purpose: This module provides internationalization (i18n) functionality by exposing methods to initialize, change, and retrieve the current language, as well as translate strings using i18next.

src/core/task/__tests__/Task.spec.ts.purpose: This is a test suite for the Task module that validates core functionality around AI assistant task execution, including API interactions, tool usage, conversation history management, and error handling. The tests ensure the task system properly handles various edge cases and maintains state consistency during complex operations.

webview-ui/src/components/settings/Setti.purpose: This file implements a comprehensive settings management interface for a VS Code extension, allowing users to configure various aspects of the extension's behavior including API connections, notifications, experimental features, and UI preferences through a tabbed navigation system.

apps/web-evals/src/components/home/runs..purpose: This component manages and displays evaluation run data with filtering, sorting, and group editing capabilities. It provides UI for viewing run metrics, deleting old or incomplete runs, and organizing tools into groups.

src/shared/tools.ts.purpose: This module defines the core tooling infrastructure for a code assistance AI system, providing type definitions, parameter schemas, and configuration for various tools that can interact with codebases, execute commands, and perform development tasks.

src/i18n/setup.ts.purpose: This module initializes and configures the internationalization (i18n) system for the application by loading translation resources from locale-specific JSON files and setting up the i18next library with fallback and debugging options.

src/utils/fs.ts.purpose: This utility module provides filesystem operations for creating directory structures and checking file existence asynchronously. It supports cross-platform path handling and tracks newly created directories for potential cleanup.

src/shared/package.ts.purpose: Provides runtime configuration for application packaging metadata, allowing environment-based overrides of package.json values for different deployment variants.

src/shared/__tests__/modes.spec.ts.purpose: This file contains unit tests for mode selection and tool validation logic used in a code assistance system. It verifies that different operational modes (like markdown editor or CSS editor) correctly restrict or allow specific tools based on file types and mode configurations.

src/core/tools/__tests__/useMcpToolTool..purpose: This file contains unit tests for the useMcpToolTool functionality, which handles interactions with MCP (Model Coordination Protocol) tools within a task execution context. It validates parameter handling, error conditions, approval flows, and image-based tool responses.

src/api/transform/stream.ts.purpose: Defines the streaming response data structures for an AI API, enabling real-time delivery of text, reasoning, tool calls, usage metrics, and grounding sources from language models.

src/services/tree-sitter/queries/index.t.purpose: This module serves as a centralized export point for language-specific Tree-sitter query modules, aggregating parsing configurations for 20+ programming languages including Solidity, PHP, Vue, TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, Java, Rust, Ruby, C++, C, C#, Go, Swift, Kotlin, CSS, Elixir, HTML, Lua, OCaml, TOML, SystemRDL, TLA+, Zig, embedded templates, Elisp, and Scala.

src/core/webview/__tests__/ClineProvider.purpose: This is a test suite for the ClineProvider component, validating its message handling capabilities and task management functionality within a VS Code extension environment.

src/services/mcp/__tests__/McpHub.spec.t.purpose: This is a test suite for the McpHub service that validates Model Context Protocol server connections, configuration handling, and cross-platform compatibility features. The tests ensure proper server initialization, connection management, and Windows-specific command wrapping behavior.

src/core/config/__tests__/importExport.s.purpose: This file contains comprehensive unit tests for the import and export functionality of application settings, specifically validating how different AI provider configurations and model parameters are handled during these operations.

src/services/code-index/__tests__/config.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the CodeIndexConfigManager class, which manages configuration settings for a code indexing feature including provider selection, API keys, and model configurations. The tests validate configuration loading, secret management, and restart requirements when settings change.

src/services/code-index/vector-store/__t.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the QdrantVectorStore client, verifying its integration with the Qdrant vector database for code indexing operations such as initialization, upserting, searching, and deletion. It ensures proper handling of workspace paths, API keys, and search filters.

src/core/context-management/__tests__/co.purpose: This file contains comprehensive unit tests for context management functionality, specifically validating token estimation, conversation truncation, and automated context condensation behaviors within AI chat interactions.

src/core/config/__tests__/CustomModesMan.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the CustomModesManager class, which handles loading, saving, and managing custom AI assistant modes configuration data in both global settings and per-workspace configurations. The tests verify functionality around file system operations, YAML serialization, and cross-platform path handling.

src/core/prompts/sections/__tests__/cust.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the custom instructions loading functionality, specifically validating how agent rule files (.md) are loaded and merged with global settings in different modes.

src/services/skills/__tests__/SkillsMana.purpose: This is a comprehensive test suite for validating skill management functionality including discovery, creation, deletion, moving, and updating of AI agent skills across different modes and scopes. The tests ensure proper file system operations, configuration handling, and cross-platform compatibility for skill persistence and organization.

src/api/providers/__tests__/openai-nativ.purpose: This is a test suite for the OpenAI Native API handler, validating its integration with OpenAI's API and ensuring proper error handling, model configuration, and streaming functionality.

src/core/condense/__tests__/index.spec.t.purpose: This test suite validates the functionality of conversation condensation utilities, ensuring proper extraction and transformation of command blocks, tool usage, and message history for AI context management.

src/api/providers/__tests__/anthropic-ve.purpose: This test suite validates the integration and behavior of the Anthropic Vertex API handler, ensuring correct message creation, streaming responses, tool usage, and error handling for Claude models within the Roo platform.

src/core/config/__tests__/ProviderSettin.purpose: This is a test suite that validates the configuration management logic for API provider settings in a VS Code extension, ensuring proper initialization, migration, CRUD operations, and synchronization of provider profiles.

src/api/transform/__tests__/openai-forma.purpose: This test suite validates the conversion and sanitization logic for transforming messages between different AI provider formats, specifically focusing on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral formats. It ensures proper handling of text, image, tool use, and reasoning content during format transformations.

src/api/providers/__tests__/openai.spec..purpose: This file contains unit tests for the OpenAI provider integration, specifically testing the OpenAiHandler class and getOpenAiModels function to ensure proper API interactions, error handling, and model retrieval functionality.

src/core/diff/strategies/__tests__/multi.purpose: This test file validates the marker sequencing logic for a multi-search-replace diff strategy, ensuring correct parsing and validation of diff markers like <<<<<<< SEARCH and >>>>>>> REPLACE with various edge cases including line numbers and escaped characters.

src/api/providers/__tests__/bedrock.spec.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the AWS Bedrock provider integration, validating core functionality like model configuration, streaming responses, error handling, and telemetry capture.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/__tests__.purpose: This is a test suite for the ChatView component that validates core chat functionality including message rendering, user interactions, command execution, and context management within a VS Code webview environment. The tests ensure proper handling of chat messages, UI state management, and integration with VS Code's messaging system.

src/core/webview/__tests__/ClineProvider.purpose: This is a test suite for verifying the sticky mode behavior of the ClineProvider component, ensuring that UI mode settings persist correctly across different task states and initialization scenarios. The tests validate that mode changes are properly handled and maintained even when tasks are created, switched, or reloaded from history.

packages/cloud/src/__tests__/WebAuthServ.purpose: This file contains comprehensive unit tests for the WebAuthService authentication functionality, validating credential management, token refresh workflows, and integration with VS Code's secret storage across multiple environments.

src/api/transform/__tests__/reasoning.sp.purpose: This file contains unit tests for reasoning parameter generation functions across different AI model providers. It validates that the correct reasoning configurations are returned based on model capabilities and user settings.

webview-ui/src/components/chat/__tests__.purpose: This is a test suite for the ChatTextArea component, validating its rendering behavior, user interactions, and integration with extension state. It ensures proper functionality of chat input features including text entry, image attachments, API configuration selection, and prompt enhancement.

src/api/transform/cache-strategy/__tests.purpose: This file contains comprehensive unit tests for cache strategy implementations that optimize AI model prompt caching behavior. It validates logic for determining optimal cache point placements and strategy selection based on model capabilities and token constraints.

src/api/providers/__tests__/roo.spec.ts.purpose: This is a test suite for validating the Roo API provider's functionality, specifically testing streaming responses, tool call parsing, authentication flows, and error handling scenarios. It ensures the Roo integration properly handles various edge cases around streaming completion responses and tool invocation patterns.

src/api/providers/fetchers/__tests__/roo.purpose: This test suite validates the functionality of the Roo model fetching utility, ensuring proper API integration, data parsing, pricing calculations, and version handling for AI model configurations.

src/core/task/__tests__/validateToolResu.purpose: This file contains unit tests for validating and fixing tool result IDs in messages exchanged with the Anthropic AI SDK. It ensures that tool_result IDs correctly correspond to tool_use IDs and handles error reporting through telemetry.

src/services/code-index/embedders/__test.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the OpenAICompatibleEmbedder class, verifying its ability to generate embeddings and handle various error conditions during configuration validation. It ensures the embedder properly interacts with OpenAI-compatible APIs and handles authentication, connection, rate limiting, and other errors gracefully.

src/services/code-index/processors/__tes.purpose: This file contains unit tests for a code parsing service that processes various file types including JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, and Markdown. The tests validate parsing logic for different file formats, content chunking strategies, and handling of edge cases like oversized lines and unsupported file types.

src/api/transform/__tests__/model-params.purpose: This test suite validates the logic for transforming and configuring model parameters used in AI API calls, ensuring proper handling of temperature, token limits, reasoning capabilities, and verbosity settings across different model providers.

src/utils/__tests__/git.spec.ts.purpose: This file contains unit tests for Git utility functions, verifying their behavior under various conditions including success cases, errors, and edge cases. It ensures the reliability of Git integration features within the application.

packages/types/src/vscode-extension-host.purpose: This file defines the TypeScript interface contracts for message passing between a VS Code extension host and its webview/CLI components, establishing the communication protocol for AI-assisted coding features including task management, file operations, model interactions, and marketplace functionality.

apps/vscode-e2e/src/suite/tools/search-f.purpose: This file contains end-to-end tests for the Roo Code VS Code extension's search_files tool functionality, verifying that AI-assisted code searching works correctly across different file types and search scenarios.

src/services/checkpoints/__tests__/Shado.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the RepoPerTaskCheckpointService, verifying its behavior in various scenarios including initialization, file operations, and error handling. It ensures that checkpoint functionality works correctly within temporary git repositories.

src/api/providers/__tests__/lite-llm.spe.purpose: This is a test suite for the LiteLLM API handler, validating its functionality including prompt caching, streaming responses, tool calling, and model compatibility across different AI providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Bedrock.

apps/vscode-e2e/src/suite/tools/use-mcp-.purpose: This file contains end-to-end tests for the Roo Code VS Code extension's integration with MCP (Model Coordination Protocol) tools, specifically testing the use_mcp_tool functionality and file system operations.

src/core/webview/__tests__/ClineProvider.purpose: This is a test suite for validating sticky profile functionality in the ClineProvider webview component, specifically testing how provider profiles are persisted and restored across sessions. The tests ensure that API configuration names are properly handled during task initialization and profile switching operations.

src/services/code-index/__tests__/servic.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the CodeIndexServiceFactory, verifying that it correctly creates and validates different embedder implementations based on configuration. It ensures the factory properly handles various embedder providers like OpenAI, Ollama, OpenAI-compatible APIs, and Gemini.

src/core/webview/__tests__/webviewMessag.purpose: This is a test suite that validates the message handling logic for a webview-based user interface component. It ensures that various user interactions and system events are properly processed and that the correct side effects occur.

src/core/message-manager/index.spec.ts.purpose: This is a test suite for a message management system that handles conversation history truncation and rewinding operations. The tests verify proper removal of messages at and after specific timestamps while maintaining conversation integrity.

src/__tests__/history-resume-delegation..purpose: This test suite validates the behavior of task delegation resumption in a history management system, specifically ensuring parent tasks can correctly transition from 'delegated' to 'active' states while preserving metadata during reopening operations.

src/api/providers/__tests__/anthropic.sp.purpose: This file contains unit tests for the AnthropicHandler class, verifying its integration with the Anthropic AI SDK and ensuring correct behavior of message creation, streaming, and tool usage functionality.

apps/cli/src/agent/__tests__/extension-c.purpose: This test file validates the agent state detection logic and extension client behavior for handling different message types and states in a CLI application.

apps/vscode-e2e/src/suite/tools/read-fil.purpose: This file contains end-to-end tests for the Roo Code VS Code extension's read_file tool functionality, verifying that the AI assistant can properly read and process various types of files including simple text, multiline content, empty files, large files, XML content, and nested directory structures.

packages/types/src/cloud.ts.purpose: This file defines TypeScript interfaces, schemas, and enums for cloud-related data structures used in a cloud computing platform, including user information, organizations, tasks, messaging, and socket event handling. It serves as a centralized type definition module for cloud services.

Core Task Execution Engine.description: Handles AI assistant task orchestration, message flow management, and tool execution coordination

Webview UI Integration.description: Manages the VS Code webview interface components and bidirectional communication between UI and backend

API Provider Integration.description: Manages integrations with various AI model providers including OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, and authentication handling

Configuration Management.description: Handles application configuration including custom modes, provider settings, and internationalization

Evaluation System.description: Manages AI model evaluation runs and performance monitoring

Cloud Services.description: Handles cloud-based authentication and user management

Shared Utilities.description: Provides shared utility functions and type definitions used across the application

Testing Infrastructure.description: Test suites and validation logic for various application components

MCP Server Management.description: Handles Model Context Protocol server connections and configurations

supporting_evidence.description: ApiHandlerOptions type defines provider settings with reasoning and Ollama-specific configurations

getModelMaxOutputTokens contains complex business logic for calculating model token limits based on context window and provider constraints

semantic_hotspots.purpose: This module provides internationalization (i18n) functionality by exposing methods to initialize, change, and retrieve the current language, as well as translate strings using i18next.

supporting_evidence.description: Function 'initializeI18n' sets up the i18next instance with a given language.
Function 'getCurrentLanguage' retrieves the active language from i18next.
Function 'changeLanguage' updates the application's language dynamically.
